title: Job Opening Teacher at Anna University

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Teacher at Anna University
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Anna University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Teacher to strengthen our Coimbatore-based team.

About Anna University:
Anna University is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Mentoring

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Anna University!
